reference: I had a misplaced epidural during labor three months ago and have had constant bilateral ear ringing twenty-four hours a day since then. I am seeing a neurologist who thinks that eventually this will go away but hasn't even ordered a magnetic resonance imaging scan. Have you ever seen this in your practice? I think I have some nerve damage or something from the epidural.
